locations.name: Canlis
locations.subtitle: Seattle's timeless fine-dining icon
locations.description: A landmark on Queen Anne since 1950, offering elevated Pacific Northwest tasting menus, sweeping views, and legendary hospitality.

locations.name: Altura
locations.subtitle: Modern tasting-menu mastery
locations.description: An intimate Capitol Hill restaurant serving seasonal Italian-inspired tasting menus rooted in local seafood and produce.

locations.name: Cafe Juanita
locations.subtitle: Northern Italian elegance in the suburbs
locations.description: Chef Holly Smith's celebrated Kirkland destination offering refined Northern Italian cuisine through beautifully crafted tasting menus.

locations.name: Spinasse
locations.subtitle: Piedmont-style pasta heaven
locations.description: A Capitol Hill favorite known for handmade tajarin and rustic, elegant cuisine inspired by Italy's Piedmont region.

locations.name: Sushi Kashiba
locations.subtitle: Omakase mastery next to Pike Place
locations.description: Chef Shiro Kashiba's Edomae-style sushi counter offering pristine seafood and traditional technique at Pike Place Market.

locations.name: Archipelago
locations.subtitle: Filipino-American fine-dining narrative
locations.description: An intimate tasting menu weaving Filipino heritage with Pacific Northwest ingredients in a highly personal story-driven format.

locations.name: Taneda
locations.subtitle: Nine-seat sushi & kaiseki sanctuary
locations.description: A hidden Capitol Hill counter serving a long, meticulously crafted sushi-kaiseki fusion experience.

locations.name: Lark
locations.subtitle: Northwest-rooted New American elegance
locations.description: Chef John Sundstrom's refined Capitol Hill restaurant showcasing Pacific Northwest ingredients with modern finesse.

locations.name: Surrell
locations.subtitle: Modern Pacific Northwest tasting brilliance
locations.description: A tasting-menu-focused experience emphasizing local ingredients and thoughtful, elevated presentations.

locations.name: Tomo
locations.subtitle: Minimalist Japanese-American creativity
locations.description: Chef Brady Williams presents a refined, minimalist tasting menu blending American farm-to-table with Japanese influences.

locations.name: Le Pichet
locations.subtitle: Cozy Parisian bistro with market-fresh soul
locations.description: A beloved French bistro near Pike Place Market known for classic dishes, warm ambiance, and timeless charm.

locations.name: The Pink Door
locations.subtitle: Charming Italian-American dining with flair
locations.description: A whimsical Post Alley restaurant offering Italian-American cuisine with a theatrical, vibrant energy.

locations.name: Six Seven
locations.subtitle: Waterfront Pacific-Northwest celebration
locations.description: A refined seafood-driven restaurant with stunning waterfront views of Puget Sound and the Olympic Mountains.

locations.name: Staple & Fancy
locations.subtitle: Chef's tasting-menu with Italian charisma
locations.description: A Ballard spot offering an approachable yet refined family-style Italian-inspired tasting experience.

locations.name: Atoma
locations.subtitle: New-wave American fine dining
locations.description: A Wallingford home turned standout restaurant delivering modern tasting menus with creativity and polish.

locations.name: Il Nido
locations.subtitle: Rustic-chic Italian hideaway by the water
locations.description: Located at Alki Beach in a historic log-cabin structure; known for handmade pastas, seasonal antipasti, and a warm, stylish ambiance.  [oai_citation:0‡Il Nido](https://ilnidoseattle.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

locations.name: All Water Seafood & Oyster Bar
locations.subtitle: Sleek downtown seafood destination
locations.description: Pacific Northwest seafood focus in downtown Seattle (Hotel 1000); elevated yet approachable, with oysters, king salmon, and stylish surroundings.  [oai_citation:1‡All Water Seafood & Oyster Bar](https://www.allwaterseattle.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

locations.name: The Harvest Vine
locations.subtitle: Basque-inspired Spanish sophistication
locations.description: An intimate Capitol Hill gem offering thoughtful Spanish/Basque-inspired small plates in a refined but cozy setting.  [oai_citation:2‡The Harvest Vine](https://www.harvestvine.com/visit?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

locations.name: Taylor Shellfish Oyster Bar
locations.subtitle: Tide-to-table shellfish done right
locations.description: Upscale oyster bar featuring local shellfish from the Puget Sound region, with a casual-yet-elevated feel in a historic Seattle neighborhood.  [oai_citation:3‡Visit Seattle](https://visitseattle.org/members/taylor-shellfish-oyster-bar-pioneer-square-mp/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

locations.name: Cortina
locations.subtitle: Sleek modern Italian steakhouse
locations.description: Italian-steakhouse hybrid by Chef Ethan Stowell in downtown Seattle, offering house-made pasta, elevated steak and polished ambiance.  [oai_citation:4‡Ethan Stowell Restaurants](https://ethanstowellrestaurants.com/restaurants/cortina-union-square-seattle?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

locations.name: Elliott Bay Book Company
locations.subtitle: Seattle's beloved independent bookstore
locations.description: A Capitol Hill institution since 1973, featuring an extensive collection of new and used books, author events, and a cozy reading room. Known for its knowledgeable staff and community-focused atmosphere.

locations.name: Queen Anne Book Company
locations.subtitle: Neighborhood bookstore with curated charm
locations.description: A cozy independent bookstore on Queen Anne Avenue serving the community since 2008. Features carefully curated selections, local author events, and personalized recommendations in a welcoming atmosphere.

locations.name: Ophelia's Books
locations.subtitle: Fremont's literary treasure trove
locations.description: A beloved independent bookstore in Fremont since 2014, specializing in literary fiction, poetry, and thoughtfully curated selections. Known for its intimate space, author readings, and passionate commitment to independent publishing.

locations.name: Phinney Books
locations.subtitle: Community-centered neighborhood bookshop
locations.description: A welcoming independent bookstore in Phinney Ridge since 2012, offering a thoughtfully curated selection of books for all ages. Features regular author events, book clubs, and a strong focus on supporting local writers and the neighborhood community.

locations.name: Twice Sold Tales
locations.subtitle: Quirky used bookstore with resident cats
locations.description: A Capitol Hill institution since 1988, this labyrinthine used bookstore is famous for its resident cats, floor-to-ceiling shelves, and eclectic collection. Open late into the night, it's a beloved spot for book lovers seeking hidden literary gems.

locations.name: Cone and Steiner
locations.subtitle: Ballard's stylish general store and café
locations.description: A modern general store in Ballard offering thoughtfully curated home goods, gifts, apothecary items, and a café serving coffee and pastries. Known for its minimalist aesthetic and carefully selected local and artisan products.

locations.name: Evo
locations.subtitle: Outdoor gear and lifestyle destination
locations.description: A Seattle-born outdoor retailer in Fremont offering premium ski, snowboard, bike, and outdoor gear. Features a unique blend of performance equipment, streetwear, and lifestyle products with expert staff and a community-focused vibe.

locations.name: Jacob Willard Home
locations.subtitle: Refined home goods and design
locations.description: A sophisticated home goods boutique in Ballard featuring carefully curated furniture, textiles, ceramics, and design objects. Known for its elegant aesthetic, quality craftsmanship, and mix of vintage and contemporary pieces.

locations.name: Indoor Sun Shoppe
locations.subtitle: Fremont's lush plant paradise
locations.description: A beloved plant shop in Fremont offering a vibrant selection of houseplants, succulents, and botanical accessories. Known for its knowledgeable staff, healthy plants, and welcoming atmosphere that inspires urban gardening.

locations.name: Eames NW
locations.subtitle: Mid-century modern design specialists
locations.description: A Fremont destination for authentic mid-century modern furniture and vintage design pieces. Specializes in iconic designers like Eames, Herman Miller, and Knoll, offering carefully restored vintage pieces and expert knowledge.

locations.name: Prism
locations.subtitle: Curated fashion and lifestyle boutique
locations.description: A stylish Capitol Hill boutique offering carefully selected contemporary clothing, accessories, jewelry, and home goods. Known for its modern aesthetic, independent designers, and thoughtfully curated collection that blends fashion with lifestyle.

locations.name: Peace Love and Happiness Club
locations.subtitle: Vintage vibes and retro treasures
locations.description: A vibrant Fremont vintage shop offering curated retro clothing, accessories, and home goods from the 60s through 90s. Known for its colorful aesthetic, quality vintage pieces, and fun, nostalgic shopping experience.

locations.name: Monorail Espresso
locations.subtitle: Seattle's pioneering espresso bar
locations.description: A Capitol Hill institution since 1980, Monorail Espresso is one of Seattle's first espresso bars. This tiny walk-up window serves expertly crafted espresso drinks with a focus on quality and tradition, embodying Seattle's coffee culture roots.

locations.name: Ghost Note Coffee
locations.subtitle: Specialty coffee with jazz soul
locations.description: A Lower Queen Anne specialty coffee shop blending exceptional coffee with a love for jazz music. Known for its meticulously sourced beans, skilled baristas, and warm atmosphere that celebrates the artistry of both coffee and music.

locations.name: Anchorhead Coffee
locations.subtitle: Belltown's craft coffee roastery
locations.description: A Belltown specialty coffee roaster and café known for its meticulous approach to sourcing and roasting. Features expertly crafted espresso drinks, pour-overs, and a minimalist industrial space that puts the focus squarely on exceptional coffee.

locations.name: Victrola Coffee Roasters
locations.subtitle: Capitol Hill's iconic coffee destination
locations.description: A Seattle coffee institution since 2000, Victrola's flagship Capitol Hill café offers expertly roasted coffee in a spacious, community-focused environment. Known for its commitment to quality, direct-trade relationships, and welcoming atmosphere that embodies Seattle's coffee culture.

locations.name: Analog Coffee
locations.subtitle: Minimalist coffee craft on Capitol Hill
locations.description: A sleek Capitol Hill coffee shop focused on precision and simplicity. Known for its expertly pulled espresso, meticulous pour-overs, and clean minimalist aesthetic that lets the quality of the coffee speak for itself.

locations.name: Day Made Kaffe
locations.subtitle: Scandinavian-inspired coffee and pastries
locations.description: A charming Fremont café bringing Scandinavian hygge to Seattle's coffee scene. Features quality espresso drinks, Nordic-inspired pastries, and a cozy minimalist space that celebrates simplicity and warmth.

locations.name: Homage Coffee
locations.subtitle: Fremont's artisan coffee roastery
locations.description: A Fremont specialty coffee roaster and café dedicated to showcasing exceptional single-origin coffees. Known for its meticulous roasting, knowledgeable staff, and commitment to highlighting the unique characteristics of each coffee origin.

locations.name: Bonito Café y Mercadito
locations.subtitle: Latin American café and market
locations.description: A vibrant Fremont café and market celebrating Latin American coffee and culture. Features specialty coffee from Latin American origins, fresh pastries, empanadas, and a small market with imported goods, all in a warm, colorful space.

locations.name: Navy Strength
locations.subtitle: Nautical-themed craft cocktail bar
locations.description: A Belltown cocktail bar with a maritime aesthetic and serious mixology credentials. Known for its expertly crafted classic and creative cocktails, knowledgeable bartenders, and intimate atmosphere that celebrates the art of the cocktail.

locations.name: Paper Fan Cocktail Bar
locations.subtitle: Asian-inspired craft cocktails
locations.description: A Fremont cocktail bar blending Asian flavors and ingredients with classic mixology techniques. Known for its creative cocktails featuring sake, shochu, and Asian spirits, alongside a curated selection of small plates in a stylish, intimate setting.

locations.name: Dark Room
locations.subtitle: Intimate speakeasy-style cocktail lounge
locations.description: A moody Fremont cocktail bar with a photography darkroom theme and dimly-lit ambiance. Known for its expertly crafted cocktails, intimate atmosphere, and sophisticated vibe perfect for date nights and quiet conversations.

locations.name: Stampede Cocktail Club
locations.subtitle: Western-themed cocktail saloon
locations.description: A Fremont cocktail bar with a playful Western saloon aesthetic and serious craft cocktails. Known for its creative drinks, fun atmosphere, and skilled bartenders who blend classic techniques with inventive twists in a lively, welcoming space.

locations.name: The Sitting Room
locations.subtitle: Cozy living room cocktail lounge
locations.description: A Fremont neighborhood bar with a warm, living room atmosphere featuring vintage furniture and intimate seating. Known for its craft cocktails, extensive whiskey selection, and relaxed vibe that makes you feel like you're drinking in a friend's stylish home.

locations.name: Roquette
locations.subtitle: French-inspired wine bar and bistro
locations.description: A Belltown wine bar and restaurant with Parisian flair, offering an extensive wine list, craft cocktails, and French-inspired small plates. Known for its sophisticated yet approachable atmosphere, knowledgeable staff, and elegant European aesthetic.

locations.name: Zig Zag Cafe
locations.subtitle: Legendary Pike Place cocktail institution
locations.description: A Seattle cocktail pioneer since 1999, tucked beneath Pike Place Market. Known for its masterful bartenders, classic cocktails executed to perfection, and intimate atmosphere that helped define Seattle's craft cocktail movement.
